target: 8. Kaori's Request
July 23rd
Shinpei Ajiro
(The smartphone from yesterday... How did the recording turn out?)
(Please... if possible, let there be nothing on it...)
Dammit... It's perfectly clear... The video of that fake...
(...Now that I've recorded it, I can't just ignore it.)
Mio, take a look at this for a second.
A smartphone? What is it?
It's a video I took last night.
Last night? What did you film?
You'll understand when you watch it.
Wh-What in the world...?
Eh... who... is this...!? I-Is it me!?
You're lying about it being last night, right? Because I didn't go outside in my uniform last night.

It really was last night.
But the person in the video isn't Mio.
At this time, you were taking a bath.
Then… what is this…?
Hey... you know about the Shadow Sickness, right?
The Shadow Sickness... then, this is...!
Honestly... I think it's ridiculous too. But when you actually see it...
See what?
I saw it. I saw a Shadow... copying a person.
Copying…?
Yeah. It was copying them... I saw a Shadow turning into a human.
Mio!! Don't leave my side for a while!
Eh!?
I don't really know what kind of guys the Shadows are.
But since they disguise themselves as humans and sneak around, they probably won't attack in places where they'd be seen.

Being alone is too dangerous.
Let's stick together for a while.
Y-Yeah, okay. I'll do what you say, Shin-chan.
Yeah, do that.
Shin-chan, your phone is ringing. Isn't it a call?
Ah, it looks like it's from Koyuba-san.
I'm gonna go answer this.
Mmm…
What's with that look?
Weren't you the one who told me not to leave your side, Shin-chan?

I'm just going to my room to talk.
I won't be going out.
Well, it's fine by me…
Hello?
G-G-Good morning Ajiro-kun, this is Koyuba. Is now... a good time?

Ah, I'm fine.
I'm sorry for calling you yesterday when you were busy.
No, it's fine. I-I was able to talk with Ajiro-kun...
Huh?
U-U-U-Uu~...
K-Koyuba-san, what's wrong?
It's nothing…
I-Is that so? So, did you need something from me?
Yeah, I had something I wanted to ask you.
Ask me? What is it?
In tomorrow's talk show, there's a segment where I talk about Hitogashima's famous spots...
To prepare for that, I was thinking I'd like to take my time and explore the island for the first time in a while.
But to do that, I need to go outside…
If possible, I'd rather you didn't walk around alone...
Yeah, so... if possible, I was wondering if I could ask Ajiro-kun to be my guide.
So, like, going around the famous spots together and giving a brief explanation?
Just a quick explanation would be fine…
Wouldn't it be better to ask someone from the Chamber of Commerce for something like that, rather than me?
If possible, I'd like to go around and interview the islanders to get their raw opinions on the places considered famous spots.
In that case, I thought it would be easier for everyone to talk if Ajiro-kun, who can stand on the same level as the islanders, was with me rather than someone from the Chamber of Commerce.
Hmm, is that how it works...?
Is it not okay?
No, it's not like it's absolutely out of the question, but...
(What should I do? I was planning to go to Kobayakawa-san's house now to check on a few things, but...)
Umm... actually, I'm already here to pick you up.
Eh…!?
(They came to pick me up... could it be they're already nearby!?)
Y-yeah, I'm here...
You really are here...
Kaori-chan, did you come to see Shin-chan?
M-Mio, when did you get here!?
I mean, don't just barge into someone's room.
I just happened to be passing by.
You don't just happen to pass by inside someone's room.
Whatever, that doesn't matter. Anyway, Kaori-chan, what brings you here?
Ah, she wants me to show her around the island to gather material for her talk show.
You have to do all that? Being an idol is tough, huh.
(She was killed by a Shadow once. Just because we avoided it yesterday doesn't mean we can let our guard down.)
So because of that, I was planning to show Koyuba-san around the island...
Do you want to come with us, Mio?
Eh, is it okay if I come too?
Didn't I just say we should stick together for a while?
Ah, right.
Then I'll go get ready! Wait for me a bit!
Try to hurry.
Okaaay!
